channel.title: July on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in July on My Blog

item.description:
Goal - Master Websocket, Create project - quiz app

Day 1 - 6july

  • Start the project with nodejs for backend and react for frontend.
  • Start Creating Server for handling realtime quiz data from the client.

Day 2 - 7 july

– Note you can follow any video for reference for learning about websocket and how to handle quiz app in realtime.

  • Create runable nodejs backend for client where basic functionalities should work.
  • Learn or work around so i could know exactly how should i approach this problem.

Day 3 - 8 july

item.title: Goal
item.description:
I should I have clear understanding and clear goal what I want to do.

  • Do I want to pursue programming
  • If yes,then how exactly should i continue my journey

So My goal for this month is I should have atleast basic knowledge of how websockets work and how to implment it in backend to have realtime exchange of data through backend to frontend with the help of websocket.

item.title: week 4
item.description:
Goal - Master basics of websockts and complete my quiz-app

Day 1 - 27 july

==Goal== - Create a normal waitingbox where new user can join room with roomId where in waitingroom, it display username of joined user

Backend :-

Frontend :-

  • Write implementation code to show users in waitingbox in more convenient way.

Day 2 - 28 july

Day 3 - 29 july
